objects.name: Microsoft Edge security advisory (AV26-396)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-396 Date: April 27, 2026 On April 24, 2026, Microsoft published a security update to address vulnerabilities in the following product: Microsoft Edge Stable Channel – versions prior to 147.0.3912.86 The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web link and apply the necessary update. Microsoft Edge Stable Channel Release Notes
